sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check if the smallest green box moved after pressing RIGHT.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
before_seg = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation['nodes']

print("Smallest green box BEFORE:")
for n in before_seg:
    if n['color'] == 'N' and n['pixels'] == 8:
        print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}")

print("Smallest green box AFTER:")
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'N' and n['pixels'] == 8:
        print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check all green box positions
print("\nAll green boxes AFTER:")
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}, pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.content:
The smallest green box moved from cols 36-38 to cols 39-41. So clicking on it selected it, and RIGHT moves it. Now I need to figure out which charcoal box to move it to. Let me map out the charcoal boxes and green boxes:
Charcoal boxes:
- id=4: boundary=[[8, 8], [15, 12]] - 8x5 box, rows 8-15, cols 8-12, interior 6x3 (rows 9-14, cols 9-11)
- id=10: boundary=[[38, 53], [42, 60]] - 5x8 box, rows 38-42, cols 53-60, interior 3x6 (rows 39-41, cols 54-59)
- id=12: boundary=[[41, 5], [48, 12]] - 8x8 box, rows 41-48, cols 5-12, interior 6x6 (rows 42-47, cols 6-11)
- id=18: boundary=[[50, 50], [54, 54]] - 5x5 box, rows 50-54, cols 50-54, interior 3x3 (rows 51-53, cols 51-53)
Green boxes:
- id=8: 3x6 box (rows 33-35, cols 39-44) - interior 1x4 with B center
- id=14: 6x3 box (rows 42-47, cols 33-35) - interior 4x1 with B center
- id=16: 6x6 box (rows 45-50, cols 42-47) - interior 4x4 with B center
- id=20: 3x3 box (rows 54-56, cols 39-41) - interior 1x1 with W center
Matching by size:
- 3x3 green box (id=20) → 3x3 interior charcoal box (id=18)
- 3x6 green box (id=8) → 3x6 interior charcoal box (id=10)
- 6x3 green box (id=14) → 6x3 interior charcoal box (id=4)
- 6x6 green box (id=16) → 6x6 interior charcoal box (id=12)
The smallest green box is currently at rows 54-56, cols 39-41. The target charcoal box interior is rows 51-53, cols 51-53. So I need to move UP by 3 rows and RIGHT by 12 cols.
Let me plan: move RIGHT several times to get to col 51, then UP to get to row 51.
Current: rows 54-56, cols 39-41
Target: rows 51-53, cols 51-53
Need: UP 3, RIGHT 12 (4 RIGHT moves of 3 cols each)
Let me move RIGHT 4 times and UP 1 time.
